content: Summary: Victim Arjun Mehta was murdered between 9:30 PM and 10:15 PM on October 15, 2023, at his residence. No forced entry. Weapon: Kitchen knife, planted post-mortem. DNA under victim’s nails matches no database, but matches Vikram Desai’s 2021 blood donation record (collected at Pune Blood Bank). Nidhi Rao’s digital footprint confirms communication with Vikram Desai and execution of ₹25 lakh transfer. Priya Mehta’s alibi is false — CCTV shows her leaving at 9:45 PM. Mrs. Kulkarni’s testimony about hearing argument at 10:45 PM is false — her porch light was off and her camera was disabled at that time. Father Thomas’s initial statement was recorded, but later retracted after cash payment from unknown source (Constable Ramesh has reported bribe attempt). Vikram Desai’s office CCTV was spoofed — original footage shows his car leaving at 9:50 PM. The forged property deed was created by Vikram using Nidhi Rao’s access to Arjun’s documents. Nidhi Rao fled to Goa on October 16. Motive: Financial gain through property fraud and elimination of victim. Suspects: Vikram Desai (primary), Nidhi Rao (accomplice). Priya Mehta may be complicit in financial fraud. Case forwarded for charge sheet.
